title: 围绕“研发投入与业绩”：①找出2025年第三季度... - 净利润

meta.source_sql:
WITH q3_2025_rnd AS (
    SELECT 
        stock_code,
        stock_abbr,
        rnd_expense_ratio,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rnd_expense_ratio DESC) AS rnd_rank_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rnd_expense_ratio ASC) AS rnd_rank_asc
    FROM financials_view 
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3' 
        AND rnd_expense_ratio IS NOT NULL
),
top10_rnd AS (
    SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, rnd_expense_ratio
    FROM q3_2025_rnd
    WHERE rnd_rank_desc <= 10
),
bottom10_rnd AS (
    SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, rnd_expense_ratio
    FROM q3_2025_rnd
    WHERE rnd_rank_asc <= 10
),
profit_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        stock_code,
        stock_abbr,
        report_period,
        net_profit_yoy_growth
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period IN ('2024Q3', '2025Q3')
        AND net_profit_yoy_growth IS NOT NULL
),
top10_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        t.stock_code,
        t.stock_abbr,
        t.rnd_expense_ratio,
        p2024.net_profit_yoy_growth AS growth_2024q3,
        p2025.net_profit_yoy_growth AS growth_2025q3
    FROM top10_rnd t
    LEFT JOIN profit_growth p2024 ON t.stock_code = p2024.stock_code 
        AND p2024.report_period = '2024Q3'
    LEFT JOIN profit_growth p2025 ON t.stock_code = p2025.stock_code 
        AND p2025.report_period = '2025Q3'
),
bottom10_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        b.stock_code,
        b.stock_abbr,
        b.rnd_expense_ratio,
        p2024.net_profit_yoy_growth AS growth_2024q3,
        p2025.net_profit_yoy_growth AS growth_2025q3
    FROM bottom10_rnd b
    LEFT JOIN profit_growth p2024 ON b.stock_code = p2024.stock_code 
        AND p2024.report_period = '2024Q3'
    LEFT JOIN profit_growth p2025 ON b.stock_code = p2025.stock_code 
        AND p2025.report_period = '2025Q3'
),
comparison_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        '研发费用占比前十' AS group_type,
        COUNT(*) AS company_count,
        AVG(rnd_expense_ratio) AS avg_rnd_ratio,
        AVG(growth_2024q3) AS avg_growth_2024q3,
        AVG(growth_2025q3) AS avg_growth_2025q3
    FROM top10_growth
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '研发费用占比后十' AS group_type,
        COUNT(*) AS company_count,
        AVG(rnd_expense_ratio) AS avg_rnd_ratio,
        AVG(growth_2024q3) AS avg_growth_2024q3,
        AVG(growth_2025q3) AS avg_growth_2025q3
    FROM bottom10_growth
)
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT 
        stock_abbr AS 公司简称,
        rnd_expense_ratio AS 研发费用占比,
        growth_2024q3 AS "2024Q3净利润同比增长率",
        growth_2025q3 AS "2025Q3净利润同比增长率"
    FROM top10_growth
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        '---对比组---' AS 公司简称,
        NULL AS 研发费用占比,
        NULL AS "2024Q3净利润同比增长率",
        NULL AS "2025Q3净利润同比增长率"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        group_type AS 公司简称,
        avg_rnd_ratio AS 研发费用占比,
        avg_growth_2024q3 AS "2024Q3净利润同比增长率",
        avg_growth_2025q3 AS "2025Q3净利润同比增长率"
    FROM comparison_summary
)
ORDER BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN 公司简称 LIKE '---%' THEN 2
        WHEN 公司简称 LIKE '研发费用%' THEN 3
        ELSE 1
    END,
    研发费用占比 DESC;
